falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 makes a new 200-day high with >15% volume surge
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout with both price and volume confirmation would invalidate the pattern's similarity to a bottom and prove the current HOLD is incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX drops below 12 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX level below 12 indicates extreme complacency, refuting the current UNKNOWN phase and proving the market has moved beyond the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
